steps.title: Identify the pathway both examples follow
steps.content: Both examples (coyote and condor) follow the same pathway: the word originates in an Indigenous language (Nahuatl or Quechua), enters Spanish, and then enters English from Spanish.

steps.title: Match the pathway to the correct point
steps.content:
Choice A states that Spanish served as the medium through which Indigenous languages influenced English—the exact role the examples demonstrate.

Choices B and D make unsupported claims, while C adds a direction of borrowing not shown in the passage.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
